# 谷歌主题 `google`

品牌蓝，来自 Google Material Design 主色。

## Logo
- 待补充（封面 cover-top 保留部门名文字）

## CSS

```css
:root {
    --primary:       #4285F4;
    --primary-dark:  #1A56C4;
    --primary-light: #6CA0F8;
    --primary-pale:  #EEF3FE;
    --primary-dim:   rgba(66, 133, 244, 0.12);
    --cover-bg:      linear-gradient(125deg, #0D2B7A 0%, #1A4AC0 35%, #4285F4 65%, #6CA0F8 100%);
    --section-bg:    linear-gradient(135deg, #0D2B7A 0%, #1A4AC0 50%, #4285F4 100%);
    --red:           #EA4335;
    --green:         #34A853;
    --orange:        #FBBC04;
}
.slide-section { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0D2B7A 0%, #1A4AC0 50%, #4285F4 100%) !important; }
.slide-qa      { background: linear-gradient(125deg, #0D2B7A 0%, #1A4AC0 35%, #4285F4 65%, #6CA0F8 100%) !important; }
```
